mapper.insert: insert into article_reports ( id, article_id, reporter_id, reason, reporter_comment, status, moderator_id, moderator_note, created_at, resolved_at ) values ( #{report.id}, #{report.articleId}, #{report.reporterId}, #{report.reason}, #{report.reporterComment}, #{report.status}, #{report.moderatorId}, #{report.moderatorNote}, #{report.createdAt}, #{report.resolvedAt} )
mapper.update: update articles set deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{articleId}
mapper.select: select id, article_id, reporter_id, reason, reporter_comment, status, moderator_id, moderator_note, created_at, resolved_at from article_reports where id = #{id}
